name: Steve Nelson
description: American jazz vibraphonist and marimba player
abstract: Steve Nelson (born August 11, 1954) is an American jazz vibraphonist and marimba player. In addition to his solo work, Nelson is known for collaborating since the 1990s with bassist Dave Holland's Quintet and Big Band.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: Wayne Shorter Quartet and Dave Holland Quintet
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Kenny Barron
about_quotes.evidence: I had a quartet at one point, and he was part of it, with Buster – Buster Williams and Ben Riley.
about_quotes.doc_title: Kenny Barron — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Christian McBride
about_quotes.evidence: Steve Nelson is playing vibes... on the other half of the album
about_quotes.doc_title: Christian McBride interviewed by Monk Rowe, Sarasota, Florida, April 12, 1996

about_quotes.speaker: Harry Allen
about_quotes.evidence: I see so many of the people that were there during my four years at Rutgers... Steve Nelson... Most everybody that was there has gone on to make it in the business.
about_quotes.doc_title: Harry Allen interviewed by Monk Rowe, Chautauqua, New York, September 13, 1997
